title: I'm Nobody!
content:
I'm Nobody!    Who are you?
    Are you nobody, too?
    Then there's a pair of us -- don't tell!
    They 'd banish us, you know.

    How dreary to be somebody!
    How public, like a frog
    To tell your name the livelong day
    To an admiring bog!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "I'm Nobody!", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
